_comment: Example edge-mcp registry (placeholders). Real state lives per-install in runtime/_state/registry.json (gitignored). Credentials are VAULT refs, never inline. Host- and account-agnostic.

hosts.label: User's Mac
hosts._note: Reachable from any node/account. Set node_id to run node-local (no ssh) when the host also runs a CF node.

servers.label: User's real Chrome
servers._note: recipe:browser-attach. pre_launch starts Chrome with --remote-debugging-port; set config.user_data_dir for the real logged-in profile.
